title: Oil tankers reportedly moving through Strait of Hormuz, CEO says, as prices slide
snippet: Tankers are seen at the Khor Fakkan Container Terminal along the Strait of Hormuz, a waterway through which one-fifth of global oil output passes. Despite Iran tensions, oil prices are sliding.

title: Delta, Southwest hike checked bag fees as airlines face surging fuel costs
snippet: Flying is about to get pricier as Delta and Southwest hike checked baggage fees to $45 for the first bag amid surging jet fuel costs

title: LARRY KUDLOW: GOP must message better to win the midterms
snippet: Rather than forecast energy prices, I think a better message would remind Americans what the mission is in Iran

title: Gold Trump coin moves forward after Treasury invokes rare authority
snippet: The US Mint is advancing a gold commemorative coin featuring President Trump after the Commission of Fine Arts approved a design, Treasury officials say

title: Jamie Dimon says New York, other cities face worker exodus as lawmakers push higher taxes
snippet: JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon said that high taxes and regulatory burdens in places like New York City are driving businesses and workers to states like Texas

title: Oracle hires new CFO with 950K salary as thousands face layoffs amid AI push
snippet: Oracle reinstates the CFO role by hiring Hilary Maxson from Schneider Electric as the company reportedly lays off thousands amid a massive AI buildout
